parameters.query:
SELECT 
  p.id AS project_id,
  p.project_number,
  p.name AS project_name,
  sp.trade,
  sp.start_date,
  sp.start_date - CURRENT_DATE AS days_until,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_material_needs pmn 
   WHERE pmn.project_id = p.id AND pmn.source = 'auto' AND pmn.status = 'planned'
   AND pmn.trade = sp.trade
  ) AS unordered_count,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pmn.total_quantity * COALESCE(pmn.unit_price_net, 0)), 0)
   FROM project_material_needs pmn 
   WHERE pmn.project_id = p.id AND pmn.source = 'auto' AND pmn.status = 'planned'
   AND pmn.trade = sp.trade
  ) AS unordered_value
FROM schedule_phases sp
JOIN projects p ON p.id = sp.project_id
WHERE sp.status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'completed')
  AND sp.start_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '5 days'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM project_material_needs pmn 
    WHERE pmn.project_id = p.id AND pmn.source = 'auto' AND pmn.status = 'planned'
    AND pmn.trade = sp.trade
  )
  AND p.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED', 'ARCHIVED')
ORDER BY sp.start_date, p.project_number;

SELECT 
  p.id AS project_id,
  p.project_number,
  p.name AS project_name,
  sp.trade,
  sp.start_date,
  sp.start_date - CURRENT_DATE AS days_until,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_material_needs pmn 
   WHERE pmn.project_id = p.id AND pmn.source = 'auto' AND pmn.status = 'planned'
   AND pmn.trade = sp.trade
  ) AS unordered_count,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pmn.total_quantity * COALESCE(pmn.unit_price_net, 0)), 0)
   FROM project_material_needs pmn 
   WHERE pmn.project_id = p.id AND pmn.source = 'auto' AND pmn.status = 'planned'
   AND pmn.trade = sp.trade
  ) AS unordered_value
FROM schedule_phases sp
JOIN projects p ON p.id = sp.project_id
WHERE sp.status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'completed')
  AND sp.start_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '5 days'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM project_material_needs pmn 
    WHERE pmn.project_id = p.id AND pmn.source = 'auto' AND pmn.status = 'planned'
    AND pmn.trade = sp.trade
  )
  AND p.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED', 'ARCHIVED')
ORDER BY sp.start_date, p.project_number;
